## What changed

Describe the smallest implemented change.

## Why it changed

Explain the user problem and why this approach satisfies the acceptance
criteria.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Files or modules affected

List the affected modules, contracts, storage locations, workflows, or
documentation.

## Tests run

List exact commands and results, including focused suites and the full gate.

```text
command: result
```

## Migration impact

State `None`, or list schema versions, supported prior states, backup evidence,
failure rollback, reopen/integrity results, and downgrade behavior.

## Rollback method

Identify the source rollback anchor and the non-destructive user-data rollback
procedure.

## Privacy and security impact

Describe changes to data categories, classification, providers, network routes,
credentials, permissions, logs, storage, deletion, recovery, or threat model.

## Evidence-traceability impact

Describe provenance, uncertainty, coverage, human confirmation, active/stale
revisions, and fail-closed behavior.

## Screenshots

For visible UI changes, include screenshots made with synthetic data only.
Otherwise state `Not applicable`.

## Remaining risks

List known limitations, skipped checks, and follow-up Issues.

## Checklist

- [ ] The Pull Request is linked to an Issue and stays within its acceptance criteria.
- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` and the relevant ADRs and policies.
- [ ] Bug fixes include a regression test.
- [ ] Required focused and full checks pass.
- [ ] Persistent-schema changes include migration, backup, compatibility, and rollback evidence.
- [ ] No credential, signing material, real meeting content, diplomatic record, user workspace, database, log, model, or generated briefing is included.
- [ ] Fixtures, screenshots, logs, and examples are synthetic, anonymized, licensed, or already public.
- [ ] No release, signing, notarization, deployment, or external publication is introduced by this Pull Request.
